assertions.reason: Run 24264431548 is the CI workflow on branch main with event push; workflow file also declares on.push.branches [main] (ci.yml lines 3-5).
Job "Go Vet + Test + Build" completed successfully; step metadata marks both "Go vet" and "Go test" as success, and logs show `go vet ./...` and `go test ./... -count=1` ran in that job.

The same job ran on an Ubuntu runner with GOOS=linux and GOHOSTARCH=amd64, executed `go build ./cmd/...`, and the repository has five command directories (`auth`, `gateway`, `proxy`, `sandbox`, `vmctl`) covered by that pattern; the step concluded success.
Job "Build Frontend" step "Build frontend" succeeded; logs show `cd frontend && pnpm build`, Vite production build output, and emitted `dist/index.html`.

Job "Deploy to Staging (Node B)" succeeded; deploy logs show SSH to Node B, `git fetch origin`, `git reset --hard origin/main`, a Nix pre-build, and `/run/current-system/sw/bin/nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#go-choir-b` completing with "Switch complete".
The deploy job includes a smoke-test loop over ports 8081-8084; logs show each `/health` curl returned service JSON and `Port <port>: OK`, so the post-deploy health checks passed.

summary: Validated GitHub Actions run 24264431548 for deploy milestone CI assertions. All 6 assigned assertions passed based on workflow metadata plus job log evidence from the successful push-to-main run.
